baseline.notes: Original sporting_ac 5f batch baseline. Run 47 with yolo_crop reached F1 0.215 but stripped context on Rush (-0.049 F1). Run 50 tests field-detection crop: same intent as yolo_crop but removes only non-pitch regions, preserving the entire playing surface.

targets.notes: If field_crop recovers the sporting_ac gain (F1 >= 0.22) AND Run 49 held Rush baseline, the approach is positive-sum and ready for cross-game batch.

notes: Run #50 (RESUBMITTED). Original chained submission returned the existing completed Run 47 job id because the API dedupes by video SHA — worker_commit_matches_manifest=false flagged it. This submission: deleted the stale job, resubmitted fresh. Commit aa172ab / worker 12aa0fd both include field_crop code.
